case_title: HOLDA WASHER CENTER REPAIR SERVICE VS PALMER, KATHY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLDA WASHER CENTER REPAIR SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMER, KATHY $109.00 PRINCIPAL, $87.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $196.00, BEAR FLAG PROCESS SHOWS COST TO SERVE = $65; PLAINTIFF WROTE THEM CHECK FOR $131. IF BEAR FLAG FILES AMENDED PROOF WITH COST TO SERVE OF $131, THE PLAINTIFF COST AWARD TO INCREASE ACCORDINGLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $109.00 FILED BY HOLDA WASHER CENTER REPAIR SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PALMER, KATHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-22-2003, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-03-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PALMER, KATHY
